# The Secret Karimunjawa — Full Site Content

> 3 exclusive ocean-facing villas in Karimunjawa with 120° sunset panorama. Built with love, welcomed like family. Rated 9.6 Exceptional on Booking.com.

---

## Our Story
What began as a dream of a couple from Bandung and Germany in 2013 is now three ocean-facing villas — a place where guests are welcomed like family by Eddy, Patricia, their sons and their wonderful team. Not artificial luxury. Genuine warmth.

---

## Villas
Every villa has its story. Cipaku, Birdsong, Tivoli Garden — each one was built for someone special. All rates include a homemade breakfast.

### 1. Cipaku (One-Bedroom)
- **Description**: The family's first villa — full kitchen, private veranda, and 100% privacy. Built for Patricia's parents, who once lived in the area 'Cipaku' in Bandung, now open for you.
- **Bed**: King Bed (2m x 2m)
- **Features**: Full Private Kitchen, Ocean-Facing Veranda, 100% Total Privacy, Sunset Over the mangroves.
- **Price**: Starting from Rp 1,600,000 to Rp 1,900,000 / night.

### 2. Birdsong (Deluxe)
- **Description**: Designed for the family's closest friends. The widest veranda and most spacious Villa at The Secret. 'Birdsong' is a name of a cute Cafe in the Indian Himalayas, where Eddy and Patricia loved to spend their holidays while they were living in India.
- **Bed**: King Bed (2m x 2m)
- **Features**: Spacious Room and Widest Veranda, Hidden panorama over the mangrove bay, Golden Sunset views, Surrounded by jungle.
- **Price**: Starting from Rp 1,600,000 to Rp 1,900,000 / night.

### 3. Tivoli Garden (Superior)
- **Description**: A villa with a hidden garden. Flexible for couples or small families. 'Tivoli Garden' was the name of the apartment where Eddy and Patricia were living in Manila, Philippines.
- **Bed**: Queen Bed (1.8m x 2m) + Double Bed (1.5m x 2m)
- **Features**: Private Garden, Flexible Bedding, Sunset View over the mangrove bay, Family Friendly.
- **Price**: Starting from Rp 1,600,000 to Rp 2,500,000 / night.

---

## Facilities & Amenities
- **120° Sunset and Stargazing Rooftop**: Our guests' favorite spot for morning coffee, afternoon sunsets and dinner under the milky way.
- **Cozy Open Kitchen-Bar**: The heart of The Secret - an exclusive, in-house dining experience where our private chef prepares refined local and international cuisine.
- **Eco-conscious Living**: Dedicated zero single-use plastic approach and effort to recycle and compost.
- **Sunrise Breakfast**: Homemade bread and jam with freshly ground coffee with an ocean view.
- **Complimentary Yoga Mat**: Available in every villa.
- **Resident Dog**: Our two dogs and our cat are part of our family.

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

### Reservation & Pricing Policies
**Q: What are the check-in and check-out times at The Secret Karimunjawa?**
A: Check-in time is between 13:00 – 18:00 WIB. Check-out time is between 06:00 – 10:00 WIB.

**Q: What are the room rates?**
A: Our rates vary depending on the selected unit type and your stay dates. Prices generally range from Rp 1,600,000 – Rp 2,500,000 per night.

**Q: How can I book directly?**
A: Simply contact us via WhatsApp (+62 896 8238 1293) to check availability. Once confirmed, we'll send a payment link for a 50% deposit.

### Capacity & Unit Facilities
**Q: How many guests can stay in one unit?**
A: Cipaku and Birdsong are designed for 2 guests. Tivoli Garden can host up to 4 guests.

**Q: Are extra beds available?**
A: We can provide extra beds for 250,000 IDR.

### Food & Dining Services
**Q: Does The Secret Karimunjawa have an on-site restaurant?**
A: Yes, we have an exclusive restaurant only open to our in-house guests with options for breakfast, lunch, and dinner (needs to be pre-booked until 3pm). Vegetarian, Vegan, and dairy-free menus are available.

### Location & Activities
**Q: How far is The Secret from the city center and the beach?**
A: The Secret is the closest accommodation to the three main beaches of Karimunjawa! The nearest beaches (Batu Topeng, Sunset Beach and Tanjung Gelam) are just a 20-minute walk or 3 minutes by scooter.

**Q: Is an airport shuttle service available?**
A: Yes, we provide shuttle services from the Karimunjawa airport and harbor (surcharge applies).

**Q: What activities can be done during the stay?**
A: Relaxation (Massages, Rooftop Yoga), Water Sports (Island Hopping, Snorkeling, Diving), Exploration (Hiking Mount Maming, Stargazing), and visiting nearby beaches.

---

## Location & Contact Information
- **Address**: Jl. I. J. Kasimo, Karimunjawa, Jepara 59455, Central Java, Indonesia
- **WhatsApp**: +62 896 8238 1293
- **Email**: thesecretkarimunjawa@gmail.com
- **Instagram**: @thesecretkarimunjawa
- **Founders**: Eddy & Patricia
